Antarctic Seafloor Annotated Imagery Database - Classification Guide Edited by Jan Jansen 2023-07-26 Point-score classification catalog This Classification Catalog shows example images for all labels used for the point-scoring method in the Antarctic Seafloor Annotated Imagery Database (AS-AID). It aims to give users an overview of the labels with reference to matching CATAMI labels. This catalog represents a snapshot of the database at the time of publication of the associated data-paper. Up to nine randomly selected images are presented for each classification, alongside a table with the following information: CATAMI: matching label in the CATAMI classification. For more information, the CATAMI paper can be found under this link AMC_ID: matching identifier in the Australian Morphospecies Catalog, and extension of the CATAMI classification. CAAB codes: Codes for Australian Aquatic Biota Found_in_surveys: a list of all surveys in AS-AID in which this organism has been detected Total_annotations: the total number of annotations for this label VME-taxa: whether this label is identified as a CCAMLR Vulnerable Marine Ecosystem taxa Please direct any enquiries, questions or comments to Jan.Jansen@utas.edu.au 1 Sessile Fauna 1.1 Ascidia Ascidia -
